content: UNPrompt, as an unconstrained prompting framework for open-ended generative AI, can be integrated with the 2025 iteration of the Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) for autonomous agents to create a self-directed generative agent that assigns intrinsic reward to exploring unprompted, unexpected output spaces instead of only optimizing for user-specified prompts. This hybrid system would allow autonomous agents to discover useful, novel generative capabilities that no human would have thought to explicitly prompt for.
